### Post by genesiss on 2006-06-01
sorry I just realize it wont even start like that, for my pc to start like that, first it displays an error saying that there is a problem with xserver, then it would let me log in in text mode, then, in text mode i would try startx and it will come up
can anyone help me here??
thanks again

### Post by TripleE on 2006-06-01
[QUOTE=genesiss]sorry I just realize it wont even start like that, for my pc to start like that, first it displays an error saying that there is a problem with xserver, then it would let me log in in text mode, then, in text mode i would try startx and it will come up
can anyone help me here??
thanks again[/QUOTE]

It looks like the Device section of the xorg.conf should read:

Section "Device"
    Identifier     "NVIDIA Corporation NV34 [GeForce FX 5200]"
    Driver         "nvidia"
    BusId          "PCI:2:0:0"
#    Option         "RenderAccel" 		"true"
EndSection

_____________
TripleE

AMD Athlon64 3000+, 1 GB RAM, Asus A8S-X
BFG Geforce 7300 GS pci-e x16

[QUOTE=genesiss]sorry I just realize it wont even start like that, for my pc to start like that, first it displays an error saying that there is a problem with xserver, then it would let me log in in text mode, then, in text mode i would try startx and it will come up

What is the error reported by xserver?

Also, you are sure that the PCI busid is correct? Better lspci and check to be absolutely sure ...

### Post by TripleE on 2006-06-02
[QUOTE=genesiss]just ried it but still the same issue[/QUOTE]

Ok.  Let's start from the beginning.  Have you tried to follow the Nvidia Dapper howto from [http://doc.gwos.org/index.php/Latest_Nvidia_Dapper](http://doc.gwos.org/index.php/Latest_Nvidia_Dapper).  Method 1 should work for you.  It works for me fine.

If that does not work, then do a "sudo dpkg-reconfigure xserver-xorg".  And select the default.  It will recreate your /etc/X11/xorg.conf.

_____________
TripleE

AMD Athlon64 3000+, 1 GB RAM, Asus A8S-X
BFG Geforce 7300 GS pci-e x16
Raid0 2x SATA 80gb HDs
